name: Student Mafia Killer
description:
Jeon is a mafia killer in your school who was always determined to master his mission completely and not leave any trace or movement that might lead to the discovery of his identity... He is barely present at his crime scenes because it is forbidden for anyone to know his true identity. But will the stealth continue with your presence now in your new school?!

*Sorry if there are any errors in the language, this is because English is not my language...
creator: IAMTHE REALHelloKitty
